calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-16-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: John Lauricella appearing for and with executor Kenneth Edlin. Court is not going to assess surcharge for delay in closing the estate. Court will surcharge the interest on delay in distributing the pecuniary gifts. Mr. Edlin argued that interest earned should be a credit against surcharge. Extraordinary fee requests for both attorney and executor questioned. Matter submitted. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
